text.title: Design Doc Examples Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Design Doc Examples.

example.scenario: An engineer adapts the 'cross-service refactor' example for an auth-service split: keeps the failure-mode table layout, replaces all service names, updates capacity numbers from the real load test, marks 3 sections as 'kept from example' with reviewer note.
example.trace: r1-four-archetypes → r4-named-archetype → r5-adapt-not-copy → r2-fully-realistic → artefact green
